dc:title: eLife Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: life sciences
biomedicine
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 1000 articles published in eLife between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. eLife is a fully open-access journal.

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year, stratified random sample, 2017-2026, target fully met after resampling 14 oversized-PDF exclusions
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall OA check, Europe PMC PMCID lookup, europepmc.org direct download, elifesciences.org landing-page PDF-link scrape as fallback
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 441 garbled/missing/version-suffix-only GROBID-extracted DOIs corrected from verified CrossRef sample DOI, 23 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef, 14 oversized PDFs resampled, 1 duplicate-article resample caught and corrected before publishing, 0 remaining duplicates, 0 thin-content papers
